baseUrls.description: A list of the URL prefixes that must match URLs to be processed by this URL-to-item-resolver.

urlPattern.description: A regular expression that will be matched towards the URL that is processed by this URL-to-item-resolver. The ECMAScript specification for regular expressions (ECMA-262) is used for the evaluation. The named groups defined by the regular expression will be used later to extract values from the URL.
